name: go-tools
description: Skills for writing and reviewing idiomatic Go (Go 1.26), with release-note lookup for target Go versions.

interface.shortDescription: Idiomatic Go writing and review skills
interface.longDescription: Skills for writing, reviewing, and checking Go code against a Go 1.26 ruleset covering naming, errors, types, concurrency, testing, imports, control flow, documentation, package API design, and official Go release notes for target module versions.
defaultPrompt: Review this Go package for idioms.
Write this Go function using current conventions.
Look up the docs for this Go API.
Load Go release notes for this module.
